{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Sun Day
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Sun Day]] is a mid-year celebration occurring in a few weeks.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Sun Day]] is a time or event mentioned in relation to advancing stages.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
